text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and Yaeno Muteki has come
to visit.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pardon my intrusion.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer. Let's do our best this
year.
choice_data_list:
Same to you! I'm looking forward to a good
year!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My classic year has finally begun. I can't afford to
waste a moment of this crucial time, so I'll be
returning to my family dojo to fit in some martial
arts practice.
choice_data_list: Can I come observe your training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel it'd be best if I saw what Yaeno Muteki's
training entails before I start planning for the
future.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... As long as it's limited to watching. I don't
believe you would be physically able to
participate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like training at the Kongo Yaegaki dojo
is pretty intense. I think I'll be fine just watching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But even that presumption could be naive of me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel my toes turning to ice cubes as I stand
observing. It's bitterly cold, even with my fleece,
woolly hat, winter jacket, and thermals on.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Deep inhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Seiyaa!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Too slow! Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing that Yaeno Muteki and the other
students can stay focused in such thin clothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded of just how disciplined she is, both
in mind and body.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Have you warmed up?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Here's some soup. The best way to warm your
body is from the inside out.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry it's nothing too fancy, but I hope you'll
enjoy it all the same. Yaeno made those rice balls
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to refuse such a kind gesture, I take a bite
out of one of Yaeno Muteki's homemade rice
balls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fluffy rice practically melts in my mouth. The
more I chew, the sweeter it becomes, and before I
know it, I finish the entire thing!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Perhaps it's because we cook our rice in a
traditional kamado stove.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If you want to bring out the true flavor of the
rice, a kamado is definitely the way to do it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, my skills don't hold a candle to those
of Granm—my grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's not true. This rice is fluffy and
delicious.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while, though, so I'm rusty. I wasn't too
sure how hot to make it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As with all things, the secret is consistency. My
goal for this year is to focus on making steady
progress.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'd like to hear your opinion!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What kind of training do you think I should
prioritize for my classic year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year, I'm going to recommend that Yaeno
Muteki should...
choice_data_list: Aim for a well-balanced training routine!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, my self-training could very well be lacking
in balance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno has a tendency to see things from a limited
perspective, but it seems you're doing a splendid
job of guiding her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In that case, perhaps I should train to improve...
my running?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I suspect I haven't been running enough during my
Kongo Yaegaki training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Then, let's strike while the iron's hot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our plan set, we head to a local school's
track and perform some running drills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how diligently Yaeno Muteki trains
every single day, I tell her that what she needs is
sufficient rest.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I can believe that. Even back when she used
to train at home, she tended to overdo it a bit.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Since you're taking some time off anyway, how
about going out for a little trip?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, at her grandmother's suggestion, we head
to a local farm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! Look at those big round eyes and that tiny
pink nose... Ah, look! It's stretching its stumpy
little legs out!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's adorable... I want to protect it...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Just the sight of it is deeply soothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like seeing the farm animals has left
Yaeno Muteki feeling completely refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
An ultimate skill... You speak of a technique with
the potential to change the outcome of a race,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... But an ultimate skill is not something one
can master overnight.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Even in the world of martial arts, it is only
through experience and relentless pursuit that
mastery can truly be achieved.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Blaze fierce and water still is our school's
technique. With that in mind, perfecting such
Yaegaki techniques could result in my acquiring
an ultimate skill.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Master, I humbly request instruction!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Very well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Then, let us begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training with her grandfather, a master of
the Kongo Yaegaki style, Yaeno Muteki attains
valuable insight!
